tool_args.label: New York State Department of Transportation

payload.entity_name: New York State Department of Transportation

payload.title: Acting Assistant Deputy Chief Procurement Officer – LIRR Procurement

tool_args.label: LIRR Dual-Mode Locomotives – Option 3
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") is requesting Board approval to exercise Option 3 of the contract awarded to Siemens Mobility, Inc. ("Siemens") for the design, manufacturing, testing, and delivery of up to 44 dual-mode locomotives

payload.description: Exercise of Option 3 of Contract 244941 for design, manufacture, test, and delivery of up to 44 dual-mode locomotives, including related non-car items, and contract extension

tool_args.label: Base Contract Award to Siemens (Dec 2020)
tool_args.raw_text: In December 2020, the Board authorized the award of competitively solicited Contract 244941 to Siemens for the design, manufacturing, testing, and delivery of 19 base-order locomotives including options

payload.description: Board authorized award of Contract 244941 to Siemens for 19 base-order dual-mode locomotives plus options

tool_args.label: Option 2 for CDOT Dual-Mode Locomotives (Jun 2023)
tool_args.raw_text: The Board approved Option 2 for six dual-mode locomotives for CDOT in June 2023.

payload.description: Board approved Option 2 for six dual-mode locomotives for CDOT

tool_args.label: Board Request for Option 3 (Dec 2024)
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") is requesting Board approval to exercise Option 3

payload.description: LIRR requesting Board approval to exercise Option 3 of Contract 244941 for up to 44 dual-mode locomotives

tool_args.label: Delivery Period for 44 Dual-Mode Locomotives (2027-2031)
tool_args.raw_text: delivery of the 44 Dual-Mode Locomotives is scheduled to begin in 2027 and be completed in 2031 for an overall delivery period of 72 months from the Notice of Award

payload.description: Delivery of 44 dual-mode locomotives scheduled to begin in 2027 and be completed in 2031

tool_args.label: Metro-North First Two Siemens Locomotives Phase 2 Testing
tool_args.raw_text: Metro North received the first two Siemens locomotives, which have successfully completed Phase 1 testing on schedule in Pueblo, Colorado. They are now in Phase 2 testing in the Metro-North environment and are expected to enter passenger service in early 2025.

payload.description: First two Siemens locomotives completed Phase 1 testing in Pueblo, Colorado; in Phase 2 testing in Metro-North environment; expected to enter passenger service in early 2025

payload.description: This request as a percentage of current contract amount

tool_args.label: Airborne Emission Reduction >85%
tool_args.raw_text: cutting airborne emissions by more than 85 percent

payload.raw_value_text: cutting airborne emissions by more than 85 percent
payload.description: Tier 4 emission-compliant dual-mode locomotives reduce airborne emissions compared to existing diesel locomotives

tool_args.label: Airborne Emission Reduction >85%
tool_args.raw_text: cutting airborne emissions by more than 85 percent

payload.raw_value_text: cutting airborne emissions by more than 85 percent
payload.description: Tier 4 emission-compliant dual-mode locomotives reduce airborne emissions compared to existing diesel locomotives

tool_args.label: Replacement of Existing Diesel Locomotives
tool_args.raw_text: The 44 dual-mode locomotives under this option are needed for the replacement of existing LIRR passenger diesel locomotives that are beyond their service life.

payload.claim_text: The 44 dual-mode locomotives under this option are needed for the replacement of existing LIRR passenger diesel locomotives that are beyond their service life.
payload.description: Purpose of Option 3: replace aging LIRR diesel fleet
payload.subject: 44 dual-mode locomotives under Option 3

tool_args.label: Improved Reliable Passenger Service
tool_args.raw_text: These locomotives will provide improved reliable passenger service to the LIRR's diesel branch customers and provide more operational flexibility.

payload.claim_text: These locomotives will provide improved reliable passenger service to the LIRR's diesel branch customers and provide more operational flexibility.
payload.description: Expected benefit of new dual-mode locomotives
payload.subject: 44 dual-mode locomotives under Option 3

tool_args.label: Tier 4 Emission Compliance
tool_args.raw_text: they will also reduce the LIRR's carbon footprint featuring engines that meet Tier 4 emission regulations as defined by the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency

payload.claim_text: they will also reduce the LIRR's carbon footprint featuring engines that meet Tier 4 emission regulations as defined by the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency
payload.description: Emissions compliance for new dual-mode locomotives
payload.subject: 44 dual-mode locomotives under Option 3

tool_args.label: Capital Plan Funding Contingency
tool_args.raw_text: The 2020–2024 Capital Plan will fully fund five locomotives and 39 locomotives are contingent upon approval of the 2025–2029 Capital Plan.

payload.claim_text: The 2020–2024 Capital Plan will fully fund five locomotives and 39 locomotives are contingent upon approval of the 2025–2029 Capital Plan.
payload.description: Funding source for the 44 dual-mode locomotives

tool_args.label: FTA Transit Vehicle Manufacturer Program Applies
tool_args.raw_text: Because the base contract utilized Federal Transit Authority ("FTA") funds, federal terms and conditions apply. Therefore, the FTA Transit Vehicle Manufacturer program applies. Siemens complies with this FTA program.

payload.claim_text: Because the base contract utilized Federal Transit Authority ('FTA') funds, federal terms and conditions apply. Therefore, the FTA Transit Vehicle Manufacturer program applies. Siemens complies with this FTA program.
payload.description: Federal procurement requirements applicable to the contract

tool_args.label: LIRR implements Option 3 project
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") is requesting Board approval to exercise Option 3

tool_args.label: Siemens is contractor for Option 3
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR is requesting Board approval to exercise Option 3 of the contract awarded to Siemens Mobility, Inc.

payload.description: Siemens Mobility, Inc. is the contracted vendor for Contract 244941
